mapper.sql: id, user_id, product_id, quantity, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS cartItemId, c.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.image AS productImage, p.price AS price, c.quantity AS quantity, p.stock AS stock, p.status AS status, c.create_time AS createTime from cart_item c inner join product p on p.id = c.product_id where c.user_id=#{userId} order by c.update_time DESC, c.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item (user_id, product_id, quantity, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
